title: The Resurrection Possible And Probable.
content:
For each one body that i' th' earth is sown,
    There's an uprising but of one for one;
    But for each grain that in the ground is thrown,
    Threescore or fourscore spring up thence for one:
    So that the wonder is not half so great
    Of ours as is the rising of the wheat.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "The Resurrection Possible And Probable."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
